evidence_summary: Establish the overwhelming scale of the Wizard's manifestation to trigger a shift from fear to determination in Dorothy. The visual hierarchy must emphasize the disparity between a small human girl and a giant, disembodied head within the palace architecture.
Dorothy enters her audience with the Wizard, who appears as a Giant Head. He tells her she can only return home if she kills the Wicked Witch.
Fear $\rightarrow$ Determination/Despair.

Dorothy stands resolute or despairing after receiving her impossible task.
The Wizard issues a lethal ultimatum to Dorothy.
